blocks.text: The MICU has a self-diagnostic function to diagnose the communication and input systems. Diagnosis of communication system (Service Check Mode 1): If a communication error with B-CAN BUS off or combination meter is detected, a code corresponding to the error is displayed on the interior light. Input system diagnostics (Service Check Mode 2): The interior light blinks when inputs from switches and sensors change to enable input system diagnostics.
By connecting HDS, it is possible to diagnose failures of the MICU itself and other control units connected via B-CAN.
It has a function to hold the customized values of the MICU itself and other control units connected via B-CAN in non-volatile memory (EEPROM).
